purpose: Define controlled real-session calibration plan for CASULO Exocortex, without external claims.

batches.name: pilot
batches.purpose: Validate capture schema and reviewer protocol.

batches.name: batch_001
batches.purpose: Initial controlled calibration by work type.

batches.name: benchmark_001
batches.purpose: Expand comparison across chat layers and complexity.

batches.name: strong_internal_calibration
batches.purpose: Internal evidence base before any external claim review.

cost_as_operational_metric.rule: Cost must influence operational gate, package fit, execution readiness and calibration confidence.

apex_relation.rule: Apex maturity score is a calibration signal for system potency and Value Delta confidence.

hallucination_relation.rule: Operational hallucination index must be calibrated against input quality, complexity, cost, stale context and Apex maturity.

package_relation.rule: Work type and chat structure must be preserved when calibrating package fit.

claim_boundary: Calibration plan only. No validated real-world savings, ROI, profit, client-facing value or hallucination-reduction claim.
recommended_next_phase: PROD-3141..3180 - Real Session Capture Schema and Empty Intake
